title: Toilet Unblocker, Plunger Toilet Unblockers, High Pressure Plunger with Visual Barometer and Adapters, Toilets Unblocker Heavy Duty for Unblocking Toilets, Sink, Bathtub, Floor, Drain-Green
features: Durable Material: The toilet plunger is made of premium stainless steel and ABS materials which is reusable and durable,no need to concern about deformation and rust.. It provides more effective solution than traditional pumps and you can use it repeatedly to keep the sewer clear without causing environmental damage.

High Pressure Plunger : The toilet unblocker utilizes the power of compressed air(up to 8 Bar) to clear blockages in just a few seconds. It can be reused after a single charge.Compared with traditional plungers, toilet snakes, and toilet spiral drills, it is more time-saving and labor-saving.

Visual Air Pressure Indicator: Toilet plungers for unblocking features a visual barometer,making it easy to read the pressure value. You can adjust the corresponding pressure according to your dredging needs. We recommend 2-3bar to dredge the sink, 3-4bar to dredge the vegetable sink, 4-5bar to dredge the toilet, 5-6bar to dredge the floor drain, and 7-8bar to be high pressure, preventing splashes and damage from excessive force.

Versatile Use: The Drain Unblocker Tool is equipped with different detachable unblocking heads to meet the demands of different situations. It can be used for unclogging all kinds of pipes, such as toilets, bathtubs, squatting pans, floor drains, wash basins, vegetable sinks, blocked pipes, etc.

Easy to Operate: Just inflate the air ballon and insert it into the clogged drain, then press the air button to reach the toilet or sink to quickly clear the stubborn blockages in the sewer. Very convenient, you can operate it easily by yourself. And the drain unblocker is compact,without taking much space.
